updatedClinic.MaxCapacity);\n+    }\n+\n+    [Fact]\n+    public async Task Delete_WhenClinicExists_DeletesClinic()\n+    {\n+        var createdClinic = await CreateClinicAsync();\n+\n+        var deleteResponse = await _client.DeleteAsync($\"/api/clinics/{createdClinic.Id}\");\n+\n+        Assert.Equal(HttpStatusCode.NoContent, deleteResponse.StatusCode);\n+\n+        var getResponse = await response.StatusCode);\n+\n+        var clinic = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync\u003cClinicApiResponse\u003e(JsonOptions);\n+        Assert.NotNull(clinic);\n+\n+        return clinic!;\n+    }\n+\n+    private static ClinicFormPayload CreateClinicPayload(string prefix = \"Integration\")\n+    {\n+        var uniqueSuffix = Guid.NewGuid().ToString(\"N\")[..8];\n+\n+        return new
